name: probiotic cultures
description: Live microbial cultures added to foods to confer health benefits and support a balanced gut microbiota.
raw_text: epic greek unsweetened probiotic yoghurt: Whole Milk, Milk Solids, Cream (Milk), Stabilisers (Natural Starch, Pectin), Live Cultures (incl. L. acidophilus, Bifidobacterium, L casei, Authentic Greek Culture). | APPLE JUNIPER ACTIVE CULTURE PROBIOTIC TEA: Kombucha culture, reverse osmosis purified water, organic cane sugar, organic tea blend and apple juniper extract. | Sub Culture Probiotic For Women: Delayed release capsule (HPMC, pectin, water), rice maltodextrin, medium chain triglycerides (MCT)
